title: Political rally in Dumraon draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Dumraon promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Dumraon
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Dumraon assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Women voters of Dumraon demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Dumraon has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Flood protection works in Dumraon inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Dumraon.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Dumraon
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Dumraon assembly segment.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Dumraon triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Dumraon, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
